howItWorks.intro: This free trade zone savings calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: FTZ Savings
rules.formula: Savings = Re-export Duty Avoided + Duty Deferral Benefit
rules.explanation: Eliminated duty on re-exports plus interest savings on deferred payments.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: What is a Foreign Trade Zone?
faq.a: A designated area where imported goods can be stored, assembled, or manufactured without paying duty until entering US commerce.
Companies importing large volumes, especially those re-exporting or needing inventory deferral.
